title: Fajr & Spiritual Reset
message: Time for Namaz and Quran Tilawat. Start the day strong, Asad!

title: MERN & AI Architecture
message: Time for deep technical learning. Focus on advanced React, Next.js, and secure API data flows.

title: Deep Work (Building)
message: Open VS Code. Push code for your AI integrations and advanced E-commerce portfolio projects.

title: Rest & Qailulah
message: Step away from the screen entirely. Take a 30-45 minute nap to recharge your brain.

title: Dhuhr & Fuel
message: Midday prayer and lunch. Disconnect from the code.

title: Job Hunt & Lead Gen
message: Send out that 90+ ATS resume. Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Apollo to prospect e-commerce decision-makers.

title: Physical Reset
message: Get up! Time for bodybuilding. Hit the gym for heavy compound movements—focus on those pulls and legs.

title: Maghrib & Dinner
message: Evening prayer, family time, and dinner.

title: Lights Out
message: System shutting down in 60 seconds. Go to sleep!
